markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy for key keywords and upcoming product changes.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority:** Immediately add target keywords (`AI Recruiter`, `AI Interviewer`) to H1s and meta descriptions on core pages. This is the fastest way to signal relevance to search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Critical Fix:** Remove `noindex` tags from key product pages (`AI Interviews`, `Coordinator`). These pages are currently invisible to Google, blocking all organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Content Overhaul:** Alex.com's product lineup is changing (2 removed, 3 edited, 1 added). All new blog content must reflect this update, and existing articles will be refreshed.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Long-Term Strategy:** Build topical authority for competitive keywords via content clusters and internal linking. Carly will also provide JSON-LD schema templates to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

## Topics

### SEO for Target Keywords

  - [**Goal:** Rank for high-value keywords like `AI Recruiter`, `AI Interviewer`, and `AI for staffing`.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [**Challenge:** High competition and a lower backlink profile than competitors require a focus on topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**On-Page Optimization:** Add keywords to H1s and meta descriptions on core pages.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Create content clusters around the parent keyword (`AI Recruiter`) using related keywords to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Link all blog mentions of target keywords to their respective conversion pages (e.g., `AI Recruiter` → Homepage).](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**Schema Markup:** Implement JSON-LD schema (Organization, Product) to improve visibility for both search engines and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [**`noindex` Tags:** Key product pages (`AI Interviews`, `Coordinator`) are blocked from search indexing, preventing all organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action:** Donald to remove `noindex` tags immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Favicon:** The old favicon and company name still appear in Google search results.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly to investigate. The sitemap was resubmitted, which may resolve the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Content & Product Strategy

  - [**Product Lineup Changes:** The product suite is being updated, requiring a content refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Removed:** 2 products](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Edited:** 3 products (`Creator`, `Verify`, `Talent Match` - formerly `Discover`)](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Added:** 1 product (`Resume Screens`)](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Content Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - [Donald will provide a write-up of the new product lineup.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [GrowthX will update its internal content pipeline ("artifacts") to reflect the new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
      - [New blog content will use the updated messaging; Donald will only review for accuracy, not for product name changes.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [**Performance:** Engaged sessions are trending up post-holiday, but the article "Best AI Recruiting Tools" is underperforming and will be refreshed.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** A lower backlink count than competitors impacts domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Action:** Carly will submit a ticket to the GrowthX director team to explore backlink strategy options.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**No-Cost Tactics:** Donald can pursue guest blogging and leverage network connections for mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### GrowthX Tools & Beta Programs

  - [**Check That:** GrowthX's upcoming SEO tool (Q1 launch) offers more detailed analysis than SEMrush. Donald was invited to the beta program.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Atlas:** GrowthX's AI content creation tool. A self-serve option is a long-term goal, but the timeline is TBD.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Remove `noindex` tags from product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Update H1s and meta descriptions on core pages with target keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the write-up of the new product lineup.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [Review blog content for accuracy (ignoring product name changes).](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Investigate the favicon issue.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Send JSON-LD schema templates for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
      - [Submit a ticket to the director team regarding backlink strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [Share GrowthX's internal content "artifacts" with Donald.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [**Carly & Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
      - [Develop the `AI Recruiter` topical cluster strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
      - [Refresh the "Best AI Recruiting Tools" article.](https://fathom.video/share/cgHJgg1g6VDjMCGmMzwGHnpqpj3jFyv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
